results.title: TruDiagnostic wins NIH grant for epigenomic roadmap - LinkedIn
results.content: Our grant aims are on similar mission paths to prevent and treat chronic diseases as our AIM AHEAD NIH study utilizes AI / machine learning prediction, intervention and targeted models to deliver health promotion messaging. 🎯 “With the launch of this program, Florida is setting a powerful example for how clinical practice can utilise genomic newborn screening to identify actionable insights early enough to stop disease progression before symptoms ever appear.” – Katherine Stueland, GeneDx CEO, championing the charge for paediatric precision! On October 22, the H3 Health Hub and the Max Delbrück Center invite researchers, innovators, and early-career entrepreneurs to a hybrid workshop on developing and commercializing diagnostic technologies. The KAIST collaborative research team created an AI-predicted Parkinson’s disease score by analysing over 340 behavioural features, including gait, limb movements and tremors from Parkinson’s disease mice, condensing them into a single diagnostic metric.
